name: Uzvar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the fruit in a large pot and cover with enough cider to cover it by about one-third.
2. Add the cloves and lemon peel.
3. Simmer until the larger pieces are cooked but not falling apart.
4. Pour off the liquid into a pan and cook until reduced by one-third.
5. Add the honey, cinnamon, lemon juice, and fruit back to the pot.
6. Reheat, stirring, until well combined.
7. Taste and add more lemon juice if needed. Ensure it is not overly sweet; the flavor of the fruit should be dominant.
8. Serve warm in crystal or clear glass bowls. Keeps in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
